transcript.text:
(In Bangi Market, you can smell)
(the spicy aroma of the spicy fish cake)
(People can't just pass by the spicy fish cake)
(They stop and look...)
A person is really gonna eat that?
Where did it all go?
(How much is she eating...?)
(This much) Bon appétit
(Never-ending fish cake parade) Looks delicious
It's delicious!
(Did you forget?)
(It's spicy fish cake)
(Will she able to handle the spiciness?) I'm in trouble.. Can I eat all of this?
(Bangi Market with a friendly atmosphere)
Hello, everyone
I'm here at

Bangi Market today
I ate red fish cake
in Jecheon last time
(Jecheon's specialty, red fish cake) When it comes to Jecheon, it's red fish cake. You know, right?
(Red fish cake I ate last year in Jecheon)
I was craving red fish cake
so I search for it in Seoul and I found a place
It's so cold!
Hot fish cake is the best on a cold day like this
(Sniff sniff)
Wait, I smell something delicious here..
I found it!
(This place lures you in with the delicious smell)
(Spicy fish cake smell that stops you from leaving)
(Red spicy fish cake that increases your appetite)
(Hot fish cake that's perfect in the cold winter)

(that can't lose to spicy fish cake)
('Red Busan Fish Cake' located in Bangi Market in Seoul)
(Entering the store) Hello
Whoa, if you look there,
(Can't miss out on market tteokbokki) there's market tteokbokki! Looks delicious
It's totally the market vibe
Wow, it smells so good
(Please let me eat soon...) I want to eat so badly.. It's no joke
On the table,
I can fit 5 of these bowls
I don't think I can fit like 10 bowls here
Should I just start
with 40 only?
Excuse me, can I get...
5 servings of spicy fish cake....
6!

6 servings...?
Yes haha
- (Did I hear right?) - 6 servings and...
1 serving of regular fish cake, 1 serving of mul-tteok please
- (Then, 40?) - 30, 5, 5 so it comes to 40!
(The bowls are being filled with delicious spicy fish cake)
(Secret of spiciness: Add a lot of spicy special sauce!)
(The regular fish cake and the mul-tteok is ready as well!)
Isn't that Tzuyang?
(Eyes on her) Is she doing a mukbang?
I saw her in my mom's store...
(Mandu mukbang in Bangi-dong on November 30, 2021) (The child of the mandu place's owner I visited last year...!)
Alone?
That small girl?!
A person is really gonna eat that?
(Of course) She can eat it all

(Can't help but be shocked...) Thank you!
(A table full of fish cake..!) Looks delicious
Wow, looks delicious
They put
sauce on the red fish cake
Is the sauce tasty?
There are a lot of customers
I think it'll be really delicious
Bon appétit!
What should I eat first?
Since I came to eat fish cake,
I'll start with that
It's delicious!
The sauce...
(Warning for her who can't handle spicy foods) It's tasty but it's definitely spicy
Wait... Will I be able to eat this? I'm in trouble

I'll eat this one first
Oh, it's delicious
It's really big
The fish cake is big!
It's long and big and thick
There are thin and small fish cakes
that you can eat in one bite
but this one is thick
and big!
A sip of the soup too
The soup is delicious!
(Markets are all about fish cake soup) Fish cake soup in markets are so delicious
Wow, this is...
In Jecheon, it was like 1000 won for 3
I don't know if they raised the price now
but it was pretty cheap

(Bite-sized red fish cake) but the fish cake was thin and small
Wow, this is so big
This is
double the size? So big
It feels more thick and big
I'm in trouble
(Can't handle spicy food) I only had 4 but it's already spicy
(Can sweat it out even in winter...) My face is already heated up... It's perfect to eat during winter
My body is already hot
I really like mul-tteok
They had it
(Chewy mul-tteok has a different charm from tteokbokki) This must be more than 1 serving of tteokbokki
The mul-tteok
feels like cheese
When it feels spicy,
I gotta have a sip of the regular fish cake soup

(Her eyes are closing) Spicy....
I'll have the regular one
It's delicious!
(Sweating in this weather..) I'm sweating
Wow, I wanted to eat this too
(Thick fish cake skewer..!) I really like this
(Spicy fish cakes are disappearing fast)
(Cleared 1 bowl)
This is like soup
(...Yes, it is)
Whoa, it's spicy..!!
It's not that spicy but the more I eat the more spicy it gets
(The kid fan from earlier is here) Hello
(Selfie time) 1, 2, 3!
(The son of the owner of 'Seodusan Dim Sum') My mom told me
(Kid fan is happy he got to see her twice) I was so happy then

(Here...?) Can I get an autograph?
(?? : I guess they do it on their phones nowadays) Here?
(Drink)
(Falling for Cocopalm...!) Cocopalm is so good! It's the best!
(Cocopalm goes so well with spicy food) It's so good eating the spicy food with this sweet drink
Thank you!
(What is it?)
I said it was spicy
so she gave me soup to rinse it
It's spicy
(Emergency)
(It's the soup she just gave to rinse it...)
(More of an emergency) That surprised me
Ahh....
(Critical condition)
The soup is so delicious!

(Korean characteristic: If it's delicious, I think of rice) I want to put rice in the soup
It's a good time for mul-tteok
The tteok is really soft and chewy
(In a dazed state...)
(Holding on and continuing to eat...)
(Tzuyang down) It's spicy...
(Eventually, rinsing them off...) Let me rinse it!
(Rinsing it in the soup and drinking Cocopalm..)
(Already on the 3rd can)
(Save Tzuyang)
(Emergency solution) They pour hot soup on this so that I can eat it hot
Wow, I really
like fish cake in the winter
(There are no 1 season for fish cake) I like them in the summer too...
(Need to recharge with fish cake regularly) I gotta recharge with fish cake once in a while
(Need to recharge with fish cake regularly) After eating a good amount....

(Things to eat in the winter) In the winter, you have to eat
fish cake, yellowtail, oysters, and half-dried herring, tangerines!
But you can eat tangerines all year round these days
(Emergency solution 2) Because it was cold and too spicy....
They did this...
Yes...
This
(They did something...) I don't think it'll be spicy anymore
(Please say that)
It's slightly spicy
Definitely less spicy!
(Her tongue is already in critical condition) But my tongue is still feels spicy...
(Dead)
I just got a good idea
If I borrow scissors
and cut the fish cake into small pieces

and eat them with the soup,
(Your lung capacity is very good) I think it'll be delicious like fish cake soup
I'll take the fish cake out here
(Swoosh)
(Escape)
(Arrested)
(Putting it in place)
She ate 40 skewers...
Ohhhhh...
(Common question for all women) How can you eat 40 when you're so skinny?
Cut it up
(Live mukbang) She eats so deliciously haha
It's delicious!
It's more delicious eating like this
I should eat it a bit more like this
It's so delicious

(Hot fish cake that's more delicious with the soup)
With green onions....
This is so...
(Real reaction with a smirk) It's delicious...
(Soy sauce attack) Oh that's salty!
Tteok too!
(Arghh)
(Shaking)
(Glance)
Why are you filming this? Haha
(I was just working hard..) Didn't you bring me so that I can film you?
I did it!
I'm gonna add it all
It's so delicious like this
(Adding it all)
(Fish cake soup is the best in the winter...)

(Boom bop!)
(Finished 6 cans of Cocopalm...) It goes so well together! It's the best! It's better than soda
- Mukbang Tzuyang? - Yes
- Is she Chinese? - Haha no
It's just her nickname... Haha
(It's been a while since I heard that haha) It's been a while
I should upload a video!
(Korean native to the bone...) I'm not Chinese
(Self-introduction mukbang) I'm not Chinese
(Complete)
(Cleared the Cocopalm and the soup too!) That was good!
(Want to eat more but I have plans after...) I will stop here today since I have to go
(I'm gonna have tteokbokki and fried food next time too) I wanted to try the tteokbokki and fried food too
Anyway.. thank you
for the meal!
(They're waiting to get an autograph hehe) We're waiting to get an autograph

I watch her on YouTube!!
(Tzuyang...?)
(Really? Amazing) (He can't work because he's busy watching Tzuyang hahah)
(Met her in person) Are you done now?
(Met her in person) Yes, I'm done!
- You're prettier in person! - (Hehe) Really?
Wow, did you eat all that?
Where did it all go...?
Into my stomach...
(Are you T....?) How strange..
(Leaving full of fish cake and happiness)
